textToVideo.title: AI Text to Video
textToVideo.description: Construct a vivid dynamic world with simple prompts.

items.prompt: A dog speed climbs up a climbing wall at the olympics
The sun rises slowly between tall buildings. Ground-level follow shot of bicycle tires
Pirate ship sailing into a storm with lightning and high waves
A snow leopard walking through a snowy forest, cinematic 8k

imageToVideo.title: AI Image to Video
imageToVideo.description: Inject cinematic motion into your static photography. Upload an image and see AI perform a vivid video story.

items.prompt: Smoothly rotate this sneaker, keeping the background static
Sunset over Venetian ruins with a weathered gondolier rowing through quiet waters
Instantly capture the transformation process of the picture

introduce.title: Redefining Visual Creation
introduce.description: Nanobanana Joyflix is not just a tool, it's your creative partner. We integrate world-leading image and video generation technologies to make professional-grade creation as simple as a conversation.

items.title: Cinematic Quality
items.description: Whether it's 8K ultra-clear images or smooth 60fps video, it shows amazing detail and dynamism.

items.title: Ultimate Control
items.description: With precise natural language instructions or reference images, you have deep pixel-level control over composition, color, and motion.

items.title: Versatile Visual Workflow
items.description: Complete the entire creative process from text-to-image to final video output in one platform.

items.title: Character & Style Consistency
items.description: The unique identity-aware DNA ensures your virtual characters remain highly consistent across images and videos.

items.title: Commercial Security
items.description: All generated content can be used for commercial purposes, with support for exporting watermark-free high-definition masters.

items.title: 01. Describe Your Vision
items.description: Enter your creative description in the input box, or upload a reference photo as a base image.

items.title: 02. Select the Generation Model
items.description: Choose from image or video series models based on your needs.

items.title: 03. Harvest Your Work
items.description: Click generate, and the AI will present you with a stunning visual masterpiece in seconds, with support for subsequent conversational refinement.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Have more questions? Contact us via Discord or Email.

items.title: How do I generate the best AI videos from text?
items.description: To get the best results, be as specific as possible in your prompts. Include details about the subject, setting, art style (e.g., 'cinematic', 'anime'), and mood. The more descriptive you are, the better the AI can match your vision.

items.title: What makes you a good AI video generator?
items.description: Our AI video generator stands out due to its focus on visual quality and user control. Unlike other tools, we offer advanced style customization and generate high-definition videos, ensuring professional results every time.

items.title: Can I use an image to generate a video for free?
items.description: Simply sign up for an account, navigate to the Image to Video AI tool, upload your image, and choose an animation style. You can generate and download videos within certain length limits.

items.title: Does the Image to Video feature work with any photo?
items.description: For best results, use clear, high-resolution images. Our AI performs best when subjects are well-defined. It supports various formats including JPG, PNG, and HEIC.
